caption: The video captures a formal parliamentary session where several individuals, dressed in traditional and formal attire, are seated in rows of wooden benches. The setting appears to be a legislative assembly or parliament, with members attentively listening and engaging in discussions. In the foreground, a man in a white shirt and black vest is seen gesturing with his hand, possibly emphasizing a point during his speech. Other members are either observing him or engaged in their own conversations, creating an atmosphere of active participation and debate. The overall environment suggests a serious and structured discussion on matters of public importance.
